sinks.expression: printf( __( 'Before you can use the Crowdsignal plugin, you need to enter your Crowdsignal.com account details.', 'polldaddy' ), 'https://crowdsignal.com/' )
printf( __( 'Did you know we have a new editor for building your own custom poll styles? Find out more here.', 'polldaddy' ), 'https://crowdsignal.com/support/custom-poll-styles/' )

wp_remote_post( $this->polldaddy_url, array(
				'headers' => array( 'Content-Type' => 'text/xml; charset=utf-8', 'Content-Length' => strlen( $this->request_xml ) ),
				'user-agent' => 'Polldaddy PHP Client/0.1',
				'timeout' => $timeout,
				'body' => $this->request_xml
			) )
printf( __( 'Before you can use the Crowdsignal plugin, you need to enter your Crowdsignal.com account details.', 'polldaddy' ), 'https://app.crowdsignal.com/' )

extract( shortcode_atts( array(
			'survey'     => null,
			'link_text'  => 'Take Our Survey',
			'poll'       => 'empty',
			'rating'     => 'empty',
			'unique_id'  => null,
			'item_id'    => null,
			'title'      => null,
			'permalink'  => null,
			'cb'         => 0,
			'type'       => 'button',
			'body'       => '',
			'button'     => '',
			'text_color' => '000000',
			'back_color' => 'FFFFFF',
			'align'      => '',
			'style'      => '',
			'width'      => $content_width,
			'height'     => floor( $content_width * 3 / 4 ),
			'delay'      => 100,
			'visit'      => 'single',
			'domain'     => '',
			'id'         => ''
		), $atts, 'crowdsignal' ) )
printf( __( 'Before you can use the Crowdsignal plugin, you need to enter your Crowdsignal.com account details.', 'polldaddy' ), 'https://app.crowdsignal.com/' )
printf( __( 'Preview Poll All Polls', 'polldaddy' ), esc_url( add_query_arg( array( 'action' => 'polls', 'poll' => false, 'message' => false ) ) ) )

printf( __( 'Poll Results All Polls Edit Poll', 'polldaddy' ), esc_url( add_query_arg( array( 'action' => 'polls', 'poll' => false, 'message' => false ) ) ), esc_url( add_query_arg( array( 'action' => 'edit-poll', 'poll' => $poll, 'message' => false ) ) ) )
printf( __( 'Add New Poll All Polls', 'polldaddy' ), esc_url( add_query_arg( array( 'action' => 'polls', 'poll' => false, 'message' => false ) ) ) )
printf( __( 'Custom Styles Add New', 'polldaddy' ), esc_url( add_query_arg( array( 'action' => 'create-style', 'poll' => false, 'message' => false ) ) ) )
printf( __( 'Edit Style List Styles', 'polldaddy' ), esc_url( add_query_arg( array( 'action' => 'list-styles', 'style' => false, 'message' => false, 'preload' => false ) ) ) )
printf( __( 'Create Style List Styles', 'polldaddy' ), esc_url( add_query_arg( array( 'action' => 'list-styles', 'style' => false, 'message' => false, 'preload' => false ) ) ) )
printf( __( 'No ratings have been collected for your %s yet.', 'polldaddy' ), $report_type )

sanitizers.expression:
wp_kses_post( 'To collect and manage responses you need to connect the plugin to Crowdsignal.
It will take less than a minute and it’s free.', 'polldaddy' )

wp_kses_post( __( 'You can use Crowdsignal blocks right in your editor. Search for Crowdsignal in the blocks library and add the blocks to your page. Here is a short video to get you started:', 'polldaddy' ) )
esc_url( add_query_arg( array( 'action' => 'list-styles', 'poll' => false, 'style' => false, 'message' => false, 'preload' => false ) ) )
esc_attr( __( 'Are you sure you want to delete this answer?', 'polldaddy' ) )
esc_attr( __( 'Width 150px, the micro style is useful when space is tight.', 'polldaddy' ) )
esc_attr( __( 'Width: 630px, the wide style is good for blog posts.', 'polldaddy' ) )
esc_attr( __( 'Width: 300px, the medium style is good for general use.', 'polldaddy' ) )
esc_attr( __( 'Width 150px, the narrow style is good for sidebars etc.', 'polldaddy' ) )
